zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Morville於大約1130年出生在英國波藍德波 白 桑德斯時，她的父親Hugh de Morville47歲，母親Beatrice de Beauchamp42歲。她於1157年與William De Vieuxpont II在英國維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1210年享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud de Morville于大约1130年出生在英国波藍德波 白 桑德斯时，她的父亲Hugh de Morville47岁，母亲Beatrice de Beauchamp42岁。她于1157年与William De Vieuxpont II在英国維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1210年享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Morville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moorfield
meanings: English: locative name from Morville (Shrops), which is recorded as Mamerfeld in the 12th century, Momerefeld in 1255, and Morfelde in 1464.

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Morville was born about 1130, in Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, England, her father, Hugh de Morville, was 47 and her mother, Beatrice de Beauchamp, was 42. She married William De Vieuxpont II in 1157, in Appleby, Westmorland, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1210, at the age of 82.

Elle a épousé William De Vieuxpont II en 1157, à Appleby, Westmorland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1210, à l’âge de 82 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Morville(이)가 대략 1130년 영국 쿠벌랜드 버그 비 샌드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Morville(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice de Beauchamp(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1157년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 애플레비에서 William De Vieuxpont II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1210년 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Morville nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Burgh by Sands, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Morville, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice de Beauchamp, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com William De Vieuxpont II em 1157, em Appleby, Westmorland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1210, com 82 anos.

ru.Burgh By Sands, Cumberland, England: бург би сэндс, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Morville родилась около 1130 г. в местности бург би сэндс, кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Morville было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice de Beauchamp, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William De Vieuxpont II в 1157 г. в местности эпплеби, вестморланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1210 г. в возрасте 82 лет.
